name: ssh-core
description: SSH transport primitives — persistent daemon connections, cluster broadcast, port-forward tunnels, and direct server-to-server transfer. Use whenever the task touches ssh, scp, rsync, a remote host alias, user@host, an IP address (192.168.x.x, 10.0.x.x), or 跳板机/jumphost/bastion. Excludes localhost-only operations.
